/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -Wno-write-strings -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,jetson_inference_python.so -o ../../aarch64/lib/python/3.8/jetson_inference_python.so CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PyActionNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PyBackgroundNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PyDepthNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PyDetectNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PyImageNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PyInference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PyPoseNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PySegNet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jetson-inference-python-38.dir/PyTensorNet.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra  -L/usr/local/lib/python3.8/dist-packages/numpy/core/include/../lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra:/usr/local/lib/python3.8/dist-packages/numpy/core/include/../lib:/jetson-inference/build/aarch64/lib:/jetson-inference/build/aarch64/lib/python/3.8:/opt/nvidia/vpi2/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu: /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt ../../aarch64/lib/libjetson-inference.so -lpython3.8 ../../aarch64/lib/python/3.8/jetson_utils_python.so -lnpymath -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lnvparsers -lnvonnxparser /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_cudev.so.4.5.0 /opt/nvidia/vpi2/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libnvvpi.so.2.1.6 -lpython3.8 -lnpymath ../../aarch64/lib/libjetson-utils.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lGL -lGLU -lGLEW -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstpbutils-1.0 -lgstwebrtc-1.0 -lgstsdp-1.0 -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -ljson-glib-1.0 -lsoup-2.4 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libnppicc.so -lnvbuf_utils
